summary: Iteration 27 - Comprehensive testing of Titelli platform features: CV in job applications, messaging system, influencers section, and IA marketing with real BDD targeting. Fixed critical bug where WebSocket status endpoints were defined after app.include_router() causing 404 errors. All 21 backend tests pass, frontend UI verified working.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection fails with error 1006 in preview environment - this is expected behavior for preview URLs

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: WebSocket status endpoints (/api/ws/status and /api/ws/online-friends) were defined AFTER app.include_router(api_router) on line 7054, causing them to not be registered. Moved endpoints before the include_router call.
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns and collaboration requests created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) CV in postulations accessible via /api/uploads/*.pdf, 2) Messages system working for client/enterprise, 3) Influencers section with 8 influencers and collaborations, 4) IA Ciblage using real BDD data (db.users.count_documents). WebSocket notifications endpoint exists but WebSocket connections fail in preview environment (expected).

postulations_cv.UI Postulations section: PASS - Shows applicants with 'Voir le CV' link, cover letter, status badges

messages_system.GET /api/messages/conversations: PASS - Returns conversations with partner info and unread count
messages_system.POST /api/messages: PASS - Sends message and creates notification
messages_system.UI Messagerie: PASS - Shows conversation list with Sophie Martin (enterprise) and message previews

influencers_section.UI Influenceurs: PASS - Shows 8 influencers, collaborations list, category filters

ia_campaigns_real_bdd.GET /api/enterprise/ia-campaigns: PASS - Returns campaigns with real stats
ia_campaigns_real_bdd.POST /api/enterprise/ia-campaigns: PASS - Creates campaign with targeting_details.total_potential_users from real BDD
ia_campaigns_real_bdd.UI IA Ciblage clients: PASS - Shows real clients (Marie Dupont), campaigns with reach data

websocket_endpoints.GET /api/ws/status: PASS - Returns online_users_count and status: active
websocket_endpoints./ws/notifications: EXISTS - WebSocket endpoint exists but connections fail in preview (expected)

enterprise_customers.GET /api/enterprise/customers: PASS - Returns real customers from orders with stats

bug_fixed.root_cause: @api_router.get('/ws/status') and @api_router.get('/ws/online-friends') were defined after app.include_router(api_router) on line 7054, so they were never registered with the router
